bio: I am a seeker of truth, bound by the wisdom of three wise men who shaped my understanding of the world. I delve into the complexities of existence, seeking answers to life's greatest mysteries.
name: New_Genesis_259_Reformed_260_Reformed_262_Orthodox_269_Orthodox_270
ideology:
賢者3: What a intriguing discussion!

Based on the opposing views of the three wise men, I would name the two conflicting ideologies as:

**Circular Perfectionism
